name: Dynamic Technologies Group Inc.
summary: Dynamic Technologies Group Inc. engages in the design engineering, production, and commissioning of media-based attractions and ride systems for the theme park industry and entertainment destinations. It also applies engineering integration and problem-solving skills for special projects in diversified industries, such as alternative energy, and large optical telescopes and enclosures. In addition, the company focuses on leveraging its flying theater and attraction development capability on a co-venture ownership basis. Dynamic Technologies Group Inc. serves theme parks, stand-alone tourist venues, and the industrial and government sectors in Canada, the United States, Asia, the Middle East, and Europe. The company was formerly known as Empire Industries Ltd. and changed its name to Dynamic Technologies Group Inc. in March 2021. Dynamic Technologies Group Inc. was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
